name: §6Mammoth
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Defense: §a50
§7Cold Resistance: §b[Cold Resistance]

§6Wooly Coat
§7Gain a §a100% §7chance for mobs to not
§7inflict §b❄ Cold §7when damaging you in
§7the §bGlacite Mineshafts§7.

§6Tusk Luck
§7Gain §b+0.5✯ Magic Find §7for every
§7100 §6☘ Mining Fortune§7, doubled in the
§bGlacite Tunnels §7and §bGlacite
§bMineshafts§7.

§6Corpse Crusher
§7Gain §630☘ Mining Fortune §7for each
§bFrozen Corpse §7looted in your
§7current §bGlacite Mineshaft§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Cloud Mammoth Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aMammoth§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
